title: 10 best herbal essential oils for ulcerative colitis
description: Yarrow essential oils helps with ulcerative colitis because of its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce swelling in the intestines and alleviate symptoms such as diarrhea and abdominal pain. The oil's antispasmodic properties may also help ease cramping and discomfort, while its antimicrobial properties can help combat infection and promote a healthy gut microbiome. Additionally, yarrow essential oils may help to soothe and calm the digestive tract, reducing inflammation...
